positive: A symmetrical, stylized representation of a mystical forest portal emerging from a cosmic nebula. The central element is a stylized archway formed by intertwined bioluminescent flora and root structures. The flora should have exaggerated, clean silhouettes and vibrant colors (deep teal, amethyst, gold). The background nebula features swirling cosmic dust and stars, providing high contrast against the detailed foreground structures. Use a clean, illustrative style mixed with cosmic abstract elements. Ideal for screen printing, symmetrical, central composition, ultra-detailed, vector art quality, cinematic volumetric lighting, sharp focus, mystical, engraving style, high contrast.
negative: blurry, ugly, artifacts, grainy, noise, low detail, text, watermark, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, messy lines, signature
